body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 

Provides more detailed policies and guidelines for humans and agents to develop CliMA repos. 

I tried to separate CliMA-universal policies and guidelines from ClimaAtmos-specific ones, so that we eventually can move the universal ones to a central place for all repos. The specific ones are in `/docs/agents/clima_atmos_specific.md`.

## To-do
<!---  list of proposed tasks in the PR, move to "Content" on completion 
- Proposed task
-->


## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented
-->


<!---
Review checklist

I have:
- followed the codebase contribution guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/Contributing/
- followed the style guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/
- followed the documentation policy: https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy
- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

-->

----
- [ ] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: Updates and amendments to Agents policies

body:
Content
- Rewrite `get_simulation` to forward to `AtmosSimulation{FT}(...)` constructor, routing the YAML config into the programmatic interface
- Deleted `get_sim_info`
- Added contiguous block of constructors for each `AtmosModel` submodel, inlined getter methods that are only used once
- Deleted dead helpers: `get_jacobian(ode_algo,Y,atmos,parsed_args)`, `get_steady_state_velocity(params,Y,parsed_args)` `get_scale_blending_method, args_integrator(args,...)` parsed_args wrapper
- Deleted unused files: `src/utils/debug_utils.jl`, `post_processing/common_utils.jl`
- Deleted long-deprecated `get_integrator` function
- Update `dt_ogw` callback to 3hours, I forgot this in the previous PR #4469 
- Double dt for `config/model_configs/baroclinic_wave_hughes2023.yml`, this config took ~1hr to run previously. We can followup and try doubling timesteps for other slow configs to speed up our CI times.
title: Route YAML config through programmatic interface

body: This bump actions/checkout from 4 to 6 and bump codecov/codecov-action from 5 to 6. This PR doesn't update the downgrade tests to v2 as that requires a little bit more effort.
title: Dependabot updates
